prompt: Build a premium healthcare website inspired by TelaHealth - Virtual Doctor Visits. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.

files.content:
TelaHealth
Doctors Services Reviews Help
Doctors Services Reviews Help
Telehealth Platform

Talk to
Doctors From Home

Connect with board-certified doctors for video consultations in minutes. 24/7 availability. Prescriptions delivered. Insurance accepted.

50K+

Happy Patients

98%

Satisfaction

Our Top Doctors

Board-certified specialists available now

Dr. James Mitchell

General Medicine

15+ years experience

(342 reviews)

Dr. Sarah Chen

Cardiology

12+ years experience

(521 reviews)

Dr. Marcus Williams

Dermatology

18+ years experience

(458 reviews)

Our Services

Video Calls

HD quality video consultations with doctors

$39 per visit

Prescriptions

Digital prescriptions sent to pharmacy

Included

Medical Records

Secure access to all health records

Free

24/7 Support

Round-the-clock customer support

Always Ready

Simple 3-Step Process

1

Book Appointment

Select your doctor and preferred time. Get instant confirmation.

2

Join Video Call

Connect from your phone or computer. One-click video call.

3

Get Prescription

Receive digital prescription sent directly to your pharmacy.

Patient Stories

"Super convenient! Got diagnosed and prescribed within 20 minutes. Perfect for my busy schedule."

— Alex Johnson

"Dr. Chen was incredible. Very professional and took time to answer all my questions. Highly recommend!"

— Maria Santos

Common Questions

Yes, all consultations are HIPAA-compliant and encrypted end-to-end. Your privacy is our top priority.
Yes, we accept most major insurance plans. You can check coverage at checkout before booking.
We have urgent care doctors available 24/7. Average wait time is under 15 minutes.

Skip the Waiting Room

See a doctor from your couch in minutes
